Class Unit

java.lang.Object
ca.mcscert.jpipe.model.Unit
public final class Unit extends Object
Root of a compiled jPipe file. Contains all named justification models defined in the file.

    Returns the id that id resolves to in modelName, or id itself if no alias was registered.

    • locations

      public Map<String, SourceLocation> locations()
      Unmodifiable view of the full location registry.

    • aliases

      public Map<String,String> aliases()
      Unmodifiable view of all recorded aliases. Keys are "modelName/oldId"; values are the new (merged) id.

    • recordLocation

      public void recordLocation(String modelName, SourceLocation loc)
      Records where a model (justification or template) was declared.

    • locationOf

      public SourceLocation locationOf(String modelName)
      Returns the declared location of a model, or SourceLocation.UNKNOWN.

    • recordLocation

      public void recordLocation(String modelName, String elementId, SourceLocation loc)
      Records where a named element inside a model was declared.

    • locationOf

      public SourceLocation locationOf(String modelName, String elementId)
      Returns the declared location of an element inside a model, or SourceLocation.UNKNOWN.

    • recordAlias

      public void recordAlias(String modelName, String oldId, String newId)
      Records that oldId in model modelName was merged into newId.

    • resolveAlias

      public String resolveAlias(String modelName, String id)
      Returns the id that id resolves to in modelName, or id itself if no alias was registered.

    • accept

      public <R> R accept(JustificationVisitor<R> visitor)
